description_long: This is a large, curved widescreen computer monitor with a sleek, modern design, primarily finished in matte black with red accent lines. The front features a seamless, uninterrupted display area with a thin bezel, enhancing the immersive viewing experience. The rear panel is adorned with angular red LED-like accents and a central support column that connects to a robust, V-shaped stand. The stand appears to be made of sturdy plastic or metal, providing stability and a slight elevation to the monitor. No physical buttons or ports are visible on the front, sides, or rear, suggesting a minimalist aesthetic. The monitor's overall build suggests it is designed for gaming or professional use, with a focus on both style and functionality.
description: A large, curved widescreen monitor with a thin bezel, matte black finish, and red accent lines, supported by a sturdy V-shaped stand. The design is sleek and modern, with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wide, curved display with a thin bezel and no visible buttons or branding.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the monitor's slim profile, the curvature of the screen, and the robust central support column attached to the V-shaped stand.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals angular red accent lines, a central support column, and a visible brand logo on the back panel.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the slim profile, curved screen, and the structure of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, and minimally visible, with straight edges and no decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, V-shaped base with a central support column, likely made of plastic or metal, providing stability and a modern aesthetic.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the rear panel, centered horizontally and positioned above the stand attachment, rendered in red.
